LanguageData.FCP_SitePart_FeralGhoulNest.label: Wildes Ghul-Nest
LanguageData.FCP_SitePart_GlowingOneContainment.descr: A location with a gefährlich glowing one that could potentially be captured.
LanguageData.FCP_SitePart_GlowingOneContainment.label: glühende Eindämmung
LanguageData.FCP_SitePart_GlowingOneElimination.descr: A location with an extremely gefährlich, berserk glowing one.
LanguageData.FCP_SitePart_GlowingOneElimination.label: glühende eine Bedrohung
